Opportunities

The PRSG Lab welcomes motivated students and researchers interested in photogrammetry, remote sensing, geoinformatics, LiDAR point cloud processing, satellite image geometry, UAV mapping, and 3D reconstruction.

Prospective graduate students, undergraduate researchers, and visiting researchers are encouraged to contact the director with a brief statement of research interests and a CV.

Research Areas

  • Photogrammetry and camera sensor geometry
  • Remote sensing image processing and interpretation (GeoAI)
  • Satellite image geometry, RPC modeling, and orthorectification
  • UAV mapping and 3D reconstruction
  • LiDAR and point cloud processing
  • GIS and geospatial information analysis
  • NeRF, 3D Gaussian Splatting, and next-generation 3D scene representation methods

Who Should Apply

  • Graduate students interested in geospatial data, photogrammetry, remote sensing, or computer vision
  • Undergraduate students seeking research experience
  • Researchers with experience in Python, MATLAB, GIS, image processing, point cloud processing, or 3D reconstruction

Preferred Background

  • Basic knowledge of surveying, photogrammetry, remote sensing, GIS, computer vision, or numerical analysis
  • Programming experience in Python, MATLAB, C/C++, or related tools
  • Interest in applied geospatial problems and rigorous quantitative analysis
  • Basic ability to read and analyze SCIE journal papers

How to Contact

  • Send an email with your CV, transcript if available, and a short description of your research interests.
  • Please describe which PRSG Lab research topic you are interested in and why.

Contact Point

  • namhoon.kim@jbnu.ac.kr

Department of Civil Engineering, Jeonbuk National University

567, Baekje-daero, Deokjin-gu, Jeonju-si, Jeonbuk-do, Republic of Korea

Tel: +82-63-270-2430
